chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2668 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of bail application 16.01.2025. Mr. Liaqat Ali Khan, advocate for applicant. Mr. Abid Mehmood, advocate for complainant. Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi Addl. P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Khalid Mehmood is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.268/2024 U/s 489-F PPC of P.S. Madina Colony, Karachi. Applicant is present on interim pre arrest bail and matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. Learned counsel for both the parties submit that compromise has been made between the parties through an agreement, Photostat copy of which has been placed on record. Learned counsel for complainant in view of above has given no objection to confirmation of interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant. 3. Accordingly, in view of compromise between the parties and since the offence is compoundable, this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
